positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition featuring a vibrant constellation of mythical forest creatures (like ethereal deer, glowing owls, and forest spirits) arranged around a central, blossoming moon portal. The style should be intricate and neo-tribal, using bold linework and flat color washes combined with subtle gradient glows. Use jewel-toned colors (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple, and glowing gold) to create a magical, otherworldly mood. The composition must be suitable for repeating or single-placement print on clothing, with clean, crisp edges and a strong silhouette against a simplified background. High contrast, vector-art quality, spiritual, fantasy, symmetrical design.
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, muted, realistic, 3d render, messy, photographic, photorealism
